## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. One or two paragraphs. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor (no runtime impact)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] Conventional Commit message (`feat(scope): ...`, `fix(scope): ...`, etc.)
- [ ] Signed off via DCO (`git commit -s`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed
